hypotheses: f : forall _ : prod D D', D''
obligation.goal:
iff
  (and (forall x2 : D', isContinuous (fun x1 : D => f (pair x1 x2)))
     (forall x1 : D, isContinuous (fun x2 : D' => f (pair x1 x2))))
  (isContinuous f)

nodes.proof:
split.
- intros [H1 H2]; exact (f_cont_if_f1_and_f2_cont f H1 H2).
- intros H; split.
-- intro x2; exact (f1_cont_if_f_cont f x2 H).
-- intro x1; exact (f2_cont_if_f_cont f x1 H).
attempts:
intros D D' D'' PROSET PROSET' PROSET'' CPO CPO' CPO'' f. split.
- intros Hcont. split.
-- intro x2; apply (f1_cont_if_f_cont f x2 Hcont).
-- intro x1; apply (f2_cont_if_f_cont f x1 Hcont).
- intros [H1 H2]; apply (f_cont_if_f1_and_f2_cont f H1 H2).

split.
- intros [H1 H2]; exact (f_cont_if_f1_and_f2_cont f H1 H2).
- intros H; split.
  + intro x2; exact (f1_cont_if_f_cont f x2 H).
  + intro x1; exact (f2_cont_if_f_cont f x1 H).
failed_attempts:
intros D D' D'' PROSET PROSET' PROSET'' CPO CPO' CPO'' f. split.
- intros Hcont. split.
-- intro x2; apply (f1_cont_if_f_cont f x2 Hcont).
-- intro x1; apply (f2_cont_if_f_cont f x1 Hcont).
- intros [H1 H2]; apply (f_cont_if_f1_and_f2_cont f H1 H2).
